memory_recovered: The apparent divergence between the stale canonical queue and newer continuity commits is an intentional two-layer state model: reviewed baseline plus append-only candidate updates pending explicit compaction.
contradiction_resolution: Preserve both layers and link them. Do not overwrite the baseline or promote candidate state to canonical without reviewed compaction.

verification.method: GitHub contents writes followed by exact-path fetch verification

privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only; no raw private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads included.
limits: This artifact reconciles repository state layers only.
It does not establish the semantic correctness of every append-only update.
It does not prove deployment, test execution, private-history claims, or peer-team execution.
falsification_route: Show a reviewed commit that updated ACTIVE_QUEUE.json with the candidate state before this record, or show that the cited commits did not create append-only continuity outputs; either would require revising CON-001.
